---
title: "Causal Inference"
description: "DAGs, potential outcomes, DiD, IV, RDD, synthetic control."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="causal-inference"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Causal Inference

DAGs, potential outcomes, DiD, IV, RDD, synthetic control.
